title: Understanding the Labour Law
subtitle: A clear employment-law foundation for HR teams and managers handling people decisions.
whyThisMatters: People decisions can quickly become compliance risks when managers are unsure what the law requires. This course gives HR practitioners and line managers a practical foundation for handling employment matters with clearer judgment, better documentation, and fewer avoidable disputes.
builtFor: Line managers who handle employee issues
Business owners who need employment-law awareness
walkAwayWith: Understand key employment-law responsibilities in plain language.
Identify common risk areas in discipline, leave, and workplace conduct.
Improve documentation habits for people-management decisions.
Know when an issue needs escalation or specialist advice.

modules.title: Terms, Records, Leave, and Working Conditions

methodologyCaption: Participants work through realistic HR scenarios and documentation examples so the legal concepts stay connected to workplace decisions.
